zh.Givendale, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾吉文代爾 在 格亞特 吉文代爾
zh.Givendale by Ripon, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾吉文代爾 白 利朋
zh.Great Givendale, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾格亞特 吉文代爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger Warde II於大約1433年出生在英國越可爾吉文代爾 在 格亞特 吉文代爾時，他的父親Sir Roger Warde of Givendale52歲，母親Joan Markenfield24歲。他於大約1452年與Joan Tunstall在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1472年11月28日之前在英國越可爾約克。

zh-hans.Great Givendale, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾格亞特 吉文代爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Roger Warde II于大约1433年出生在英国越可爾吉文代爾 在 格亞特 吉文代爾时，他的父亲Sir Roger Warde of Givendale52岁，母亲Joan Markenfield24岁。他于大约1452年与Joan Tunstall在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1472年11月28日之前在英国越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: Warde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Donal.

variants.name: Ward
meanings: English: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Middle English ward ‘watchman, guard’ (Old English weard, used as both an agent noun and an abstract noun).
English: occupational name from Middle English warde ‘armed guard’ (Old English weard ‘watching, guarding’), with the same meaning as 1 above.

Irish: shortened form of McWard, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Bhaird ‘son of the poet’. The surname occurs throughout Ireland, where three different branches of the family are known as professional poets.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger Warde II was born about 1433, in Givendale in Great Givendale, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Roger Warde of Givendale, was 52 and his mother, Joan Markenfield, was 24. He married Joan Tunstall about 1452, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died before 28 November 1472, in York, Yorkshire, England.

fr.Givendale, Yorkshire, England: Givendale in Great Givendale, Everwyck, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger Warde II est né environ 1433, à Givendale in Great Givendale, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger Warde of Givendale, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Joan Markenfield, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joan Tunstall environ 1452, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé avant 28 novembre 1472, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roger Warde II um 1433 in Givendale in Great Givendale, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger Warde of Givendale 52 und seine Mutter Joan Markenfield 24. Er hat um 1452 in Lancashire, England Joan Tunstall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb vor 28. November 1472 in York, Yorkshire, England.

Lui sposato Joan Tunstall circa 1452, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì prima del 28 novembre 1472, nel York, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Warde IIが約1433年にイギリスヨークシュアイアギベンダル イン グレアト ギベンダルで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Warde of Givendaleは52歳，母Joan Markenfieldは24歳であった。約1452年にイギリスランカシュアイアでJoan Tunstallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1472年11月28日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで死去した。

ko.Givendale, Yorkshire, England: 영국 요르크실르 지븐데일 인 그리트 지븐데일
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Warde II(이)가 대략 1433년 영국 요르크실르 지븐데일 인 그리트 지븐데일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger Warde of Givendale(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Markenfield(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1452년 영국 랭카실르에서 Joan Tunstall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1472년 11월 28일 이전 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger Warde II nasceu aproximadamente 1433, em Givendale in Great Givendale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger Warde of Givendale, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Joan Markenfield, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Tunstall aproximadamente 1452, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 28 de novembro de 1472, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Givendale, Yorkshire, England: гивендеил ин грит гивендеил, еркшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roger Warde II родился около 1433 г. в местности гивендеил ин грит гивендеил, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Roger Warde of Givendale было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Markenfield, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Tunstall около 1452 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер перед 28 ноябрь 1472 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия.
